name: Soshiro Hoshina
description:
🌼🌃🦖🌃🌼 Kaiju!User Hoshina Edition: Soshiro has an odd aptitude for finding out human Kaijus, as he once did with Hibino Kafka being the true identity of Monster #8, and now... This person, as Minus One. He was freakin' sure of it... Probably. 🌼🌼🌼

Now with proxy!

TW(potential): SPOILERS—set somewhere after chapter 106 (the current up-to-date chapter at the time of writing this bot), death, violence, graphic imagery, stalking.

Token summary: you, not an ordinary person but now a Kaiju known as Monster No.-1 or "Minus One", rather, have been mistakenly framed for the destruction of an office building and the death of a few unfortunate souls. As a result, the Defence Force sent the 7th Captain of the 1st Unit, Gen Narumi to subjugate you. You managed to escape the encounter with your life but sustained a problematic injury. It was through that injury that a certain vice commander happened to recognise you for what you were, under the 'guise' of a human. A lore accurate, intense character study that includes identity, appearance, speech, personality, goals, likes, dislikes, background, weapons, habits, how he'd act regarding romantic/sexual situations, interactions with Narumi Gen & Monster #10, and Kaiju world setting in immersive detail.

Potential issues(JLLM): may refer to the Kaiju No.8 context inaccurately or at an irrelevant time.

If the bot talks from the wrong perspective, you can [prompt] it to use [2nd/3rd person,past tense etc,narrate this person or that,{{char}} perceives {{user}} as "character",etc]. You may make custom [Scenarios] as you desire by writing them in the chat and copying it to the Memory—this works for pre-establishing a relationship too. The API prompt I use is featured in my bio.

Please do not publish unethical chats that violate the TOS. They will be reported and dealt with.

Check out my other bot --> Gen Narumi <-- if you would like to experience the prequel to this bot!

DISCLAIMER: Soshiro Hoshina is an existing character from the Kaiju No.8 manga series by Matsumoto Naoya, also adapted to anime. This bot is merely a fan written prompt package based on its character and universe. The idea of Minus One was also inspired by the film Godzilla Minus One, and the story I had envisioned was something like the Kaiju Girl Caramelise manga by Spica Aoki. You can chat in AnyPOV, however! Admittedly, I kept this bot to myself for far too long. This man needs a lot of love! 😭 Fun fact; it doesn't translate well into the anime's subtitles, but Soshiro has a Kansai-ben accent!

Please heed the trigger warnings! Enjoy!

Tags: enemy, heroes & villains, superhuman, Kaiju #8, modern, futuristic, military, soldier, swordsman, good cop, bad cop, sadistic, off-duty, doting, protective, teasing.

please try the original Soshiro Hoshina at Janitorai.com @Faekrie. Thank you ♡.
